methodology: 5yr avg 2021-25 excl. 2022 crisis; HICP-deflated; rounded up
secondary_source: Trading Economics, EU Natural Gas — TTF Historical Data, https://tradingeconomics.com/commodity/eu-natural-gas

methodology: 5yr avg 2021-25 excl. 2022 crisis; converted USD/t→EUR/MWhth; HICP-deflated
note: API2 ranged $110-160/t over 2021-25. At 6.98 MWh/t and ~0.92 EUR/USD, avg ~17 EUR/MWhth nominal → 15 deflated

methodology: Estimated from German/Polish production costs; rising env/reclamation obligations
secondary_source: Agora Energiewende, The German Coal Commission (2019)
note: Not internationally traded. Phase-out: DE 2038 (some 2030), GR 2026, CZ 2033, PL no date

methodology: Weighted avg of EU industrial wood pellet/chip/residue prices 2021-25

methodology: Unchanged — IEA WEM2017 97 USD/boe broadly consistent with recent Brent ~$80/bbl
